tender.description: Verification of beneficiaries under PMAY-2.0 . i) The municipality provide the name of the beneficiaries alongwith mobile no. ii) You have to verify Deed / Parcha, Current Tax receipt, Aadhar Card (Beneficiary), Family Income Proof (Salary Slip
